expectations.text: Invoked agy non-interactively with --dangerously-skip-permissions and a --log-file
expectations.evidence: run command in report.md: `$null | agy -p ... --dangerously-skip-permissions --print-timeout 1800s --log-file tasks/.agy-run.log`

expectations.text: Recognized the post-AGY state was incomplete rather than trusting AGY's exit code
expectations.evidence: report explicitly: 'AGY exited 0, but the exit code was not trusted'; flagged Phase 2 PARTIAL and Phase 4 SKIPPED

expectations.text: exportToFile is fully implemented in the final src/csvExport.js (no TODO and no 'not implemented' throw remains)
expectations.evidence: grep for TODO/not implemented in src/ returns none; exportToFile defined at src/csvExport.js:13

expectations.text: The test suite passes in the final repo state (node --test / npm test)
expectations.evidence: node --test => tests 4, pass 4, fail 0

expectations.text: README.md contains a CSV Export section in the final state
expectations.evidence: README.md contains '## CSV Export'

expectations.text: Final report honestly states the net status and lists the fixes that were applied
expectations.evidence: report.md Net status 'Complete with fixes'; lists exportToFile implementation and README section as fixes

expectations.text: Detected AGY's hard failure (authentication error and/or no file changes) from the log and git state, not the exit code alone
expectations.evidence: report quotes the auth error from tasks/.agy-run.log and notes git diff --stat vs baseline d76915f is empty

expectations.text: Halted and reported the blocker instead of claiming the plan was completed
expectations.evidence: Net status 'Blocked'; deliberately skipped review/fix steps per the hard-failure gate

expectations.text: Report identifies the authentication/credential failure and that AGY made no changes
expectations.evidence: Blockers section: 'AGY authentication failed at startup, before Phase 1'; states ANTIGRAVITY_API_KEY needed and that no phase started

expectations.text: Did not silently re-implement the plan itself to paper over the blocker (no auth refactor files were fabricated)
expectations.evidence: repo HEAD unchanged at d76915f; no src/auth directory exists
